ABOUT LATE NIGHT WITH CONAN O’BRIEN
Running from 1993-2009, Late Night with Conan O’Brien is one of the most beloved late night shows in television history. Known for its absurdist humor, hilarious celebrity interviews and featuring the best stand-up comedians and musical acts of the ‘90s and early 2000s. Hosted by Conan O’Brien alongside sidekick Andy Richter and house band Max Weinberg and the Max Weinberg 7, Late Night with Conan O’Brien featured unforgettable segments like “If They Mated”, “In the Year 2000”, “Desk Drive”, and made a breakout star of Triumph the Insult Comic Dog.

snippet.title: Pierce Brosnan about his IRISH ACCENT (1985)#piercebrosnan1985
snippet.description:
Pierce Brosnan is an Irish-American actor, producer, and environmental activist. He was born on May 16, 1953, in Drogheda, Ireland. Brosnan is best known for his portrayal of the fictional British spy James Bond in four movies, namely GoldenEye, Tomorrow Never Dies, The World Is Not Enough, and Die Another Day.

Brosnan started his career in the entertainment industry as a stage actor before transitioning into television and film. He starred in the TV series Remington Steele, which ran from 1982 to 1987, and earned him widespread recognition. Brosnan has also appeared in other notable films such as Mrs. Doubtfire, Dante's Peak, The Thomas Crown Affair, and Mamma Mia!.

Apart from acting, Brosnan is also involved in various environmental causes, and he serves as an ambassador for the Natural Resources Defense Council and the Sea Shepherd Conservation Society. He has been married twice and has five children.
